subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto him who desireth to draw nigh unto the Most Great Ocean and drink therefrom in the name of his Lord, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد ان یتقرب البحر الاعظم و یشرب منه باسم ربه المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement
